name: Jayshree Ambekar
quote: CppIndia's tech talks helped me level up from writing C-with-classes to genuinely modern C++. The Discord community is incredibly helpful and patient.

name: Jayshree Ambekar
quote: The CppIndiaCon conference introduced me to techniques that directly improved our firmware codebase. I also found my current job through the community's job board.

name: Jayshree Ambekar
quote: As a student, I was intimidated to enter professional C++ discussions. CppIndia's welcoming culture made me feel like my questions were always worth asking.

name: Jayshree Ambekar
quote: The SIMD and performance talks at CppIndiaCon were world-class. I've attended CppCon before and the quality here is comparable — for free.

name: Jayshree Ambekar
quote: Giving my first talk at CppIndia was a turning point in my career. The audience was engaged, the feedback was constructive, and I've since spoken at CppCon.

name: Jayshree Ambekar
quote: I found CppIndia through a YouTube recommendation. Three months later I was helping organize events. The community genuinely makes you want to contribute.
